prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年广西理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约5114名→4756名→4014名→3954名→3507名，呈持续上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近5年累计前移约1607名，竞争逐年加剧；2025年基准位次约3507名，较2024年再前移约447名，上升幅度为近年最大；该校在广西理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年79人→2022年77人→2023年79人→2024年70人→2025年75人→2026年74人，2026年较2025年缩招1人，缩招幅度约1.3%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京航空航天大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名稳定在第36–37名（2026年排名第37），属于全国顶尖理工类院校，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（投档线稳步提升、入选国家卓越工程师学院、保研率升至27%），2026年周期出现实验室安全事故负面舆情，但整体关注度仍较高；抖音热度排名第61位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等；第五轮学科评估中，力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，航空航天特色鲜明，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等核心工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐；广西2026年高考总考生约39.2万人，按近年物理类占比约68.6%估算，物理类考生约26.9万人，较2025年增加约8500人，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线方面，2024–2025年物理类本科批稳定在370分左右，特殊类型招生控制线约495–501分，整体平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强劲势头、2026年招生计划微幅缩招（1人）、本省物理类考生规模扩大约8500人、学校声誉与学科实力保持高位等因素，预计2026年竞争热度在2025年基础上基本延续但略有缓和。预测最低录取位次约3501名，区间3001–4001名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（长空创新班）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化
- 低空技术与工程
- 计算机科学与技术
- 电子信息类
- 人工智能
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 航空航天类
- 机械工程
- 信息与计算科学
- 新能源材料与器件
- 核工程类
- 物联网工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3501名，区间3001–4001名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力（自动化、电子信息类、计算机科学与技术等），一档专业（长空创新班、电气工程及其自动化、计算机拔尖创新班）可作为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限（3001名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（4001名附近）建议以三档专业保底，优先选择航空航天类、机械工程等南航传统优势专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Guangxi science (physics category) were approximately 5114 → 4756 → 4014 → 3954 → 3507, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 1607 places over the past 5 years, indicating intensifying competition; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3507, advancing another 447 places compared to 2024, the largest increase in recent years; the university's enrollment plan for Guangxi science (physics category): 2021: 79 → 2022: 77 → 2023: 79 → 2024: 70 → 2025: 75 → 2026: 74, with a reduction of 1 student in 2026 compared to 2025, a reduction rate of about 1.3%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with a stable ranking of 36–37 in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (ranked 37th in 2026), belonging to the top-tier science and engineering institutions in the country, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was relatively positive (steady increase in admission scores, selection for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and a rise in the graduate school recommendation rate to 27%), while the 2026 cycle saw negative public opinion due to a laboratory safety accident, but overall attention remains high; Douyin popularity ranking is 61st, rated as "average", with moderate short video exposure; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with distinctive aerospace characteristics and strong engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended; the total number of Guangxi college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated physics category proportion of about 68.6% in recent years, resulting in about 269,000 physics category candidates, an increase of about 8,500 compared to 2025, expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; regarding the provincial control line, the physics category undergraduate batch remained stable at around 370 points from 2024 to 2025, and the special type enrollment control line was about 495–501 points, generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong momentum of continuous ranking advancement over the years, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (1 student), the expansion of the provincial physics category candidate pool by about 8,500, and the high level of university reputation and disciplinary strength, it is expected that the competition intensity in 2026 will basically continue from 2025 but with a slight easing. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 3501, with a range of 3001–4001.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation

- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information
- Artificial Intelligence
- Software Engineering.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Mechanical Engineering
- Information and Computing Science
- New Energy Materials and Devices
- Nuclear Engineering
- Internet of Things Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3501, with a range of 3001–4001. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Electronic Information, Computer Science and Technology, etc.), while Tier 1 majors (Changkong Innovation Class, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Top Innovation Class) can be used as reach targets; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3001), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4001), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing traditional advantageous majors of NUAA such as Aerospace Engineering and Mechanical Engineering.
